Powerful Components

Power Up Your Office With Attendo

Empowering businesses with scalable, efficient, and smart solutions.

View All Features

Seamless One-Click Attendance

Simplify time tracking with our intuitive manual attendance system. Staff can instantly log check-ins, breaks, and leaves from a single, user-friendly interface—no complex timesheets required. Caption: Effortless tracking for a productive workday.

Real-Time Employee Status Tracking

Gain instant visibility into your workforce. Monitor who is clocked in, on break, or clocked out directly from your centralized HR dashboard.

Effortless Activity Monitoring

Effortlessly track attendance, leaves, and notices. Our smart widgets visualize every key metric, empowering you to make instant, data-driven decisions.

Powerful Mobile Experience

Experience work on the move with our mobile app. Your team can clock in, request leave, and monitor their working hours anytime, anywhere—on any device. Fast, reliable, and built for real life, it keeps your workforce connected and empowered without missing a beat.

Visualize Daily Work Timelines

Get a crystal-clear view of your day. Track check-ins, breaks, overtime, and late arrivals with our interactive daily activity log.

Android and IOS

Some Screens of our App View

Let's make office management more easy with our Mobile App

Global Teams Supported

Manage global teams effortlessly

Our system functions independently of time zones, ensuring accurate data tracking for your team, wherever they are

Advanced Addons

Addons

Boost your HRM Experience With Advanced Addons

Biometric Device Sync

Seamlessly integrate ZKTeco and Anviz devices. Automate attendance logs and eliminate manual entry errors instantly.

Asset Management

Track company property with ease. Monitor asset assignment history, returns, and status for laptops, phones, and equipment.

Geo-Location Binding

Ensure attendance accuracy. Restrict clock-ins to specific office locations using precise GPS binding to prevent fake attendance.

Complete Payroll

Simplify salary processing. Manage full payroll records, automated calculations, and deductions in one unified system.

Automated Workflows

Instant answers for your team. An intelligent chatbot trained on your company policies to resolve employee queries 24/7.

Common Question

Got Questions About Attendo? Let’s Clear Them Up

Find quick, helpful answers to common questions about our platform features, installation, and capabilities.

Contact Us

Attendo is a feature-rich workforce management platform designed to streamline employee attendance, leave management, and organizational workflows. It offers multi-branch support, dynamic duty calendars, and detailed reporting to help you manage your team efficiently.

Yes! Attendo includes a Progressive Web App (PWA) feature and also have dedicated Mobile App. This means your staff can access the dashboard, mark attendance, and request leave directly from their smartphones without needing to download a separate heavy application from an app store.

Absolutely. We offer full White-labeling and Customizable Branding options. You can easily upload your company logo, change color schemes to match your brand identity, and configure email templates to make the system truly yours.

To run Attendo smoothly, your server needs PHP 8.3 or higher and MySQL 8 (or MariaDB 10.10+). We recommend at least 1GB of RAM and 10GB of disk space for optimal performance. The installer will automatically check these requirements for you.

Our system is built with No Timezone Dependency, making it perfect for international or remote teams. You can track accurate check-ins and check-outs regardless of where your employees are located. We also support manual attendance logging with break times.

Yes, we provide dedicated support. You can reach out via our Support contact us directly through our HelpDesk. We also offer detailed documentation to guide you through the installation and setup process.
